description: Transform your words into beautiful images with AI - create from scratch or edit existing ones using text prompts and optional reference images.
generate-images-using-the-nano-banana-pr: Submits image generation or editing request and returns session ID
the-text-prompt-describing-the-image-to-: Text prompt describing the desired image or edits to apply
output-format-of-the-generated-image: Output file format (PNG, JPEG, WebP, JPG)
session-id-for-the-image-generation-requ: Session ID for tracking generation progress
continuously-polls-the-image-generation-: Polls status until completion and returns final images
the-session-id-returned-from-the-image-g: Session ID from generation or editing request
test-flow-for-the-ai-image-generator-sub: Test flow for AI image generator subflow
edit-images-using-the-nano-banana-pro-ap: Submits image generation or editing request and returns session ID
the-text-prompt-describing-the-edits-to-: Text prompt describing the desired image or edits to apply
array-of-image-urls-to-edit-1-to-3-image: Optional reference images for editing or style-guided generation (1-3 images)
output-format-of-the-edited-image: Output file format (PNG, JPEG, WebP, JPG)
session-id-for-the-image-editing-request: Session ID for tracking editing progress
edit-images-using-nano-banana-pro-with-a: Generate or edit images using AI with automatic result polling
folder-where-the-file-will-be-saved-auto: Folder where the file will be saved (auto-detect if empty)
